data.title: Oriental Rise Serves Up Steamy IPO For Tea Lovers
data.description:
Key Takeaways:


	Oriental Rise’s shares posted strong gains in their Nasdaq trading debut, as the company raised a relatively modest $7 million
	The company will use IPO proceeds to help fund a major expansion that will boost its land area under cultivation by 50%


By Doug Young

Move over, bubble tea chains.

SPY Reaches $600 Billion In Assets: Oldest US ETF Hits Milestone As All-Time Highs Continue
data.description: The oldest U.S. ETF is the largest by assets under management. Commonly known as the SPY, the ETF passed an impressive milestone this week.
